title: System Engineer #ESY
description:
Project Delivery

• Lead the design, build, and implementation of Tier-1 turnkey projects for public sector clients.

• Install, configure, test, and commission telecommunication and IT solutions, ensuring smooth transition from project handover to operations.

• Perform OS hardening and security compliance (e.g., CIS benchmarks, patch management, vulnerability remediation).

• Prepare technical documentation, implementation guides, security hardening checklists and troubleshooting procedures.

Operations & Support

• Provide 24/7 technical support (on a rotational or standby basis) for mission-critical systems, ensuring minimal downtime.

• Troubleshoot and resolve complex issues across systems, networks, and firewalls.

• Conduct Vulnerability Assessment & Penetration Testing (VAPT) in line with security policies, ensuring vulnerabilities are remediated promptly.

• Collaborate with global vendors to escalate, track, and close technical issues.

Client & Vendor Engagement

• Act as a client-facing technical lead, able to understand requirements, environments, and constraints.

• Conduct technical workshops, solution briefings, and compliance reviews for stakeholders.

• Liaise with global vendors on system updates, integration, and security advisories.

Leadership & Mentorship (For Senior position)

• Provide technical guidance, coaching, and mentorship to junior engineers.

• Ensure that team members follow engineering best practices, security standards, and documentation guidelines.

• Support knowledge transfer within the team through structured learning sessions.

Requirements:

Certifications

• Degree or Diploma in Engineering, Computer Science, or related discipline with specialization in Communications Engineering, Computer & Software Engineering, Cybersecurity, Artificial Intelligence, or Data Analytics.

• Professional certifications such as CCNP, RHCE, VMware VCP, CISSP, CEH, OSCP, Fortinet NSE, Palo Alto PCNSE, AWS, CKA, or 5G-related are highly desirable.

Technical Skills

• Experience in high-availability and mission-critical environments is highly desirable.

• Operating Systems:

o Strong in Linux (RHEL, CentOS, Ubuntu) and Windows Server.

o Experience with CIS hardening, patching, and compliance enforcement.

• Networking:

o Hands-on experience with Cisco and Dell switches (L2/L3, VLANs, routing, BGP, spanning tree).

o Solid knowledge of TCP/IP, routing, and troubleshooting.

• Firewalls & Security:

o Practical experience in Fortinet, Palo Alto firewalls (VPNs, NAT, security policies, threat prevention).

o Experience conducting VAPT and remediation activities.

• Compliance & Security Frameworks:

o Familiarity with IM8, ISO27001, PDPA and government security guidelines.

o Experience in audit preparation, security reviews, and compliance documentation.

• Virtualisation & Cloud:

o VMware, HyperV, or OpenStack (Private Cloud / Virtualisation Platforms).

o Knowledge of containers (Docker, Kubernetes, Tanzu) and cloud (AWS, Azure) is a plus.

• Databases:

o Experience with MySQL, PostgreSQL, or Oracle databases.


Interested candidates, please email your resume to annasee@recruitexpress.com.sg

Anna See Sing Yee

CEI Reg R25157535

Recruit Express Pte Ltd

EA License No: 99C4599

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted

postedCompany.description:
Established since 1996, Recruit Express has emerged as the leading staffing solutions provider that has set a proven track record for matching the right people to the right organization within the shortest time. With our vast network of resources, extensive databases and defined recruitment processes, we have been successfully bridging talented job seekers of the highest calibre to employers who only want the best in their teams.


In our relentless pursuit of excellent service, we have adopted best practices and dynamic growth strategies in expanding our operations across the Asia Pacific regions: We have offices in Singapore, Sydney, Hong Kong, Kuala Lumpur, Taipei, Shanghai, Beijing, Tokyo and Bangkok.

With 400 permanent committed consultants from various professional backgrounds and disciplines, we make a difference by delivering top-notch services to our clients and candidates alike.
postedCompany.name: RECRUIT EXPRESS PTE LTD
